per_question.answer: Three years ago, on July 6th, 2023, NABIL's closing price stood at NPR 582.10. This represents a considerable decrease of NPR 43.30 (-7.44%) from its current close of NPR 538.80. per_question.answer: Over the past five years, NIC Asia Bank has undergone a significant decline, plummeting by 61.76% from NPR 916.00 in 2021 to NPR 350.30 today.
